headlines.title: Inflation surged to 3.8% in April, its highest level in nearly three years
headlines.description: Inflation surged to 3.8% in April, its highest level in nearly three years, as the war in Iran causes a ripple effect across the economy and energy prices rise.

headlines.title: Graphic: Track U.S., state and county gas prices
headlines.description: Are gas prices declining? NBC News is tracking national, state and county prices at the pump.

headlines.title: Map: How much you pay in federal and state gas taxes
headlines.description: As national gas price averages head toward $5 per gallon, one state has already suspended its gas tax, and now President Donald Trump and his Cabinet are talking about doing the same.

headlines.title: Map: See how gas prices have changed in the county where you live
headlines.description: How much gas prices have increased during the Iran war depends entirely on where you live, an NBC News analysis of average gas price data from AAA shows.

headlines.title: Latest Inflation Numbers Reflect Impact of War With Iran
headlines.description: The surge in energy prices is likely driving inflation to the highest in three years, nearing a 3.8% reading ahead of new numbers to be released on Tuesday. Soaring oil prices from the Iran war have added costs for farmers, ranchers, shippers and small businesses, and economists say we haven’t felt the full effects yet. NBC’s Christine Romans reports for TODAY.

headlines.title: US Adds 115,000 Jobs in April Despite Concerns Over Iran War
headlines.description: The United States economy is showing surprising signs of resilience despite the continuing war in Iran. The jobs report released on Friday showed 115,000 jobs were added in April with the unemployment rate remaining steady at 4.3 percent. NBC’s Allie Canal reports for Saturday TODAY.

headlines.title: What's a Blind Box and Why Are Big Brands Following the Trend?
headlines.description: The “blind box” trend is where consumers purchase a mystery box, not knowing what’s inside, with the hopes of hitting it big. Now major brands including Crocs and NYX Cosmetics are cashing in on the $20 billion industry. Reporting for TODAY, NBC’s business correspondent Brian Cheung breaks down the craze behind these nostalgic surprise treats that range from novelty toys to snacks, books, makeup, plants and more.

headlines.title: Source: DOJ investigating suspicious oil trades timed around Iran war
headlines.description: The Justice Department is investigating a series of oil market trades that right before important moves related to the war with Iran. At least four trades worth $2.6 billion are being examined. NBC News’ Allie Canal explains the timing of the bets.

headlines.title: ‘Get in loser, we’re buying Spirit’: One man’s viral plan to revive the airline
headlines.description: Spirit Airlines was the budget-friendly carrier America loved to hate.

headlines.title: Chinese EVs take the world by storm — except in the U.S.
headlines.description: China loves electric cars: making them, driving them and selling them to the rest of the world.

headlines.title: Grocery prices jumped more in April than they did in nearly four years
headlines.description: After warnings that the Iran war would drive up U.S. food prices, new data shows that “Food at home,” otherwise known as grocery bills, rose 0.7% in April.

headlines.title: Trump says he would support suspending the federal gas tax
headlines.description: Suspending the federal gas tax would require congressional approval, and it could cost the government billions of dollars in revenue.
